release: v0.9 Reproducible Native Build + External Review Prep
release_blocking_requirements_for_v1_fou: trusted Gradle wrapper JAR generated and checksum-recorded
Android local native tests passed through ./gradlew without soft-fail behavior
iOS physical-device evidence collected on a real device
plain_language_summary: Echo Guardian v0.9 is ready for reproducible native build preparation and external review packaging. It is not approved for compliance, clinical, medical-device, emergency-system, or silent enterprise/MDM claims.
